tipRules.tip: Johnston: Won with 102 lbs of smallmouth on drop shot. Fished an 80-yard stretch at 33 feet in Lake Ontario. Used 3/8-oz weight in all conditions but adapted presentation -- motionless on calm days, dragged through fish on windy days.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: Learned from a previous mistake of spending too much time in the river. Committed to fishing Lake Ontario exclusively even with only about 3 hours of fishing time per day due to long runs and rough conditions.
Johnston: Did most of his work on an 80-yard stretch of bottom in 33 feet loaded with big smallmouth. Even in 8-10 foot waves, the deep fish were worth the commitment.
